name: figcraft-workspace
description: AI-powered Figma plugin for design quality, UI creation, Token sync, Lint, Audit, Auto-fix via MCP.

scripts.check:schema-generated: npm run schema && npm run docs:contracts && test -z "$(git status --porcelain -- packages/core-mcp/src/tools/_generated.ts packages/core-mcp/src/tools/_registry.ts packages/core-mcp/src/tools/_contracts.ts docs/generated/api-contracts.md)"
scripts.build: npm run schema && npm run build:server && npm run build:plugin && npm run build -w figcraft-design
scripts.release:verify: npm run check:schema-generated && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
